zamorano-chongos-recipe-comedera.name: Zamorano Chongos Recipe
instructions: A large pot adds milk with cinnamon, sugar and pyloncillo. At medium / low heat, start to sew the ingredients and mix up till they are incorporated. It's very important that you avoid the boiling point.
When the liquid's warm, it adds little by little the lemon juice and blend. Kill the fire and leave to stand for 30 minutes.

After his resting time, you'll see that his milk's been a little tipsy. Turn the stove back onto low heat and let it cook for 2 hours without stirring. During cooking, milk will start to release serum (very much as water).
Terminadas las 2 horas, retira del fuego y cuela los chongos. No tires el suero.
Sirve los chongos en recipientes individuales y agrega un poco del suero. Decora con una varita de canela y disfruta.

zucchini-couscous-lezzet.name: Zucchini Couscous
instructions: 1. We offer you practical recipes with the vegetable pumpkin of the season to spend less time in the kitchen.
2. Take into account the cooking proposal on the package Kuskusu and strain.
3. thoroughly wash the grapes and fine chop in the form of the apartment.
4. Turn on olive oil for 3-4 minutes in a pan.
5. Finely chop green onions.
6. Blend and serve all materials in a wide container.

zucchini-noodles-with-basil-pesto-and-ba.name: Zucchini Noodles With Basil Pesto And Bacon

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler. Lay bacon slices on a large baking tray.
Broil in the preheated oven until crispy, 9 to 12 minutes. Transfer to a large plate lined with absorbent kitchen paper and allow to cool and harden.
Crumble the cooled bacon into smaller pieces and combine with pesto sauce.
Use a spiralizer or julienne peeler to cut zucchini into noodles, snipping midway to prevent them from getting too long.

Heat olive oil in a saute pan over medium heat. Add zucchini and garlic and cook until tender, 3 to 4 minutes. Add pesto-bacon mixture and heat for 2 minutes longer. Toss well so the noodles are evenly coated. Taste and season with salt if needed.
Top with freshly grated Parmiggiano-Reggiano cheese so it can melt while the dish is still warm. Season with freshly ground black pepper. Top with arugula, but do not mix it in. Serve immediately.

zucchini-pie-bars.name: Zucchini Pie Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease sides of a 10x15-inch jelly roll pan.
Whisk flour, 1 ¾ cups sugar, and ½ teaspoon cinnamon together in a large bowl; cut in butter with a fork to make a crumbly dough. Reserve ½ cup dough; set aside.
Press remaining ½ dough firmly into the prepared jelly roll pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden, about 10 minutes.

Combine ¾ cup sugar, lemon juice, ½ teaspoon cinnamon, and nutmeg in a large saucepan; add sliced zucchini and bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until zucchini begins to soften. Stir in reserved ½ cup dough; cook and stir until mixture thickens, 3 to 5 minutes.
Spread zucchini mixture over crust; press remaining ½ dough lightly on top.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is lightly browned, 35 to 45 minutes. Cool before slicing into 24 bars, about 20 minutes.

zucchini-spaghetti-recipe-comedera.name: Zucchini Spaghetti Recipe

ingredients.item: Pimiento en polvo (picante o no picante)

instructions: We'll start by washing the pumpkin and remove both ends. I recommend that you avoid peeling it to preserve that part of this vegetable that has more flavour and more fiber and many nutrients.

Then we will turn the pumpkin into noodles with the help of a spiralizer, a mandolin, peller, peller or knife (to count the time of this cooking recipe, we have considered that a spiralizer or mandolin is used).

Once we have obtained pumpkin spaghetti, we will have them booked at once and we will have care of garlic. We'll fight their teeth and get them as finely as we can. If we have decided to use the cherry tomatoes, we will wash them well and mince them into half.

We'll get an anti-stick frying pan and get an oil chorrit up and up. Once we're hot, we'll have to drink the garlic for 3 minutes. After this time, we will add the spaghetti and scattering them for another five minutes. We will constantly remove to mix with garlic, but delicately to avoid damage to these fragile noodles. We will also splash and add a touch of pepper powder (if you care about the pint, you can use glove powder or otherwise use Basque Espelette powder or nothing).
Retiro los zoodles de la frying pan and serve immediately, watering with a handful of parmesan cheeses (optional) and adorning with cherry jitomates (also optional).

zucchini-pecan-cake-with-cream-cheese-fr.name: Zucchini-pecan Cake With Cream Cheese Frosting

ingredients.item: 8-ounce package philadelphia-brand cream cheese (do not use reduced-fat or fat-free)

instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 177°C. Line 9-inch-diameter cake pan with 2-inch-high sides with parchment paper. Coat parchment paper with nonstick spray.

Whisk flour, baking powder, coarse salt, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg in medium bowl to blend well. Whisk oil, sugar, eggs, and vanilla in large bowl to blend well; fold in flour mixture, then grated zucchini and pecans. Transfer cake batter to prepared pan.

Bake cake until tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Cool cake completely in pan on rack, about 1 hour. Cut around sides of pan to loosen. Turn cake out onto platter; peel off parchment paper.

Using electric mixer, beat cream cheese and butter in medium bowl until blended. Beat in sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon. Spread frosting thickly over top of cake. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Cut cake into wedges and serve.
